description: Expected heartbeat files the meta-watchdog monitors. One entry per component. max_age_sec = how stale a .hb file can be before alert fires. Per scripts/heartbeat_manifest.json in the resilience-architecture plan.

components.name: resolume_watchdog
components.notes: Written by resolume_watchdog.ps1 every ~120s loop tick. Deployed Apr 20.

components.name: td_watchdog
components.notes: Existing td_watchdog.ps1 does not yet write a .hb file. Extend in Phase 1.

components.name: autolume_watchdog
components.notes: Existing autolume_watchdog.ps1 does not yet write a .hb file. Extend when Autolume is restored in Phase 2.

components.name: gallery_audio
components.notes: gallery_audio.py already writes ssd_audio_state.json every 1s; extend to also touch heartbeats/gallery_audio.hb. Deploy in Phase 1.

components.name: ambient_audio
components.notes: gallery_ambient_audio.ps1 currently logs hourly heartbeat-line to ssd_ambient_audio.log. Convert to a proper .hb file write.

components.name: td_relay
components.notes: td_relay.py to be extended to write .hb every 30s alongside its existing poll loop.

components.name: meta_watchdog
components.notes: Meta-watchdog writes its own heartbeat. Detected by health_probe.ps1 as special case.

components.name: ssh_tunnel
components.notes: CRITICAL path. ssd_ssh_tunnel.ps1 must write .hb each reconnect (~5min). Also requires verifying the tunnel SOCKET is up (not just the process) — the Apr 19 outage showed the script can be running while the actual tunnel is broken. Phase 0 priority per plan.
